paper_title: Radiolarian Analysis from Sediment Core Samples

methods.description: Process for preparing sediment core samples by removing organic and calcareous matter to analyze radiolarians.

steps.description: Samples treated with diluted hydrogen peroxide (H2O2) (15%) and hydrochloric acid (15%) to remove organic and calcareous matter.
steps.searchable_summary: treat samples with H2O2 and HCl to remove organic and calcareous matter

steps.description: The undissolved residue in each sample was sieved over a 45-µm screen.

methods.description: Examination and imaging of polycystine radiolarians using an optical microscope and digital camera.

steps.description: The examination of polycystine radiolarians was carried out under an optical microscope Nikon Eclipse E 200 at magnifications of 100× to 400×.
steps.searchable_summary: examine radiolarians under optical microscope at 100× to 400× magnification

steps.description: The photomicrographs were taken under an optical microscope at magnifications of 400× using a digital camera Olympus SP-600UZ.
steps.searchable_summary: capture photomicrographs of radiolarians at 400× magnification
